steps.causal_note: The missing library and renderer meant a standard artifact-tool build and render pass were not possible in this environment.
steps.input: import('@oai/artifact-tool') and a Python availability check for openpyxl/xlsxwriter/pandas plus soffice/libreoffice

raw_step.causal_note: The missing library and renderer meant a standard artifact-tool build and render pass were not possible in this environment.
raw_step.input: import('@oai/artifact-tool') and a Python availability check for openpyxl/xlsxwriter/pandas plus soffice/libreoffice
raw_step.observation: Importing @oai/artifact-tool failed with 'Module not found', so I checked the local Python and office stack. openpyxl/xlsxwriter/pandas were unavailable and soffice/libreoffice were not installed.
raw_step.output: ERR:Module not found: @oai/artifact-tool; openpyxl False; xlsxwriter False; pandas False; soffice not found; libreoffice not found
raw_step.reasoning: I needed to know whether the normal workbook path was available before falling back to a lower-level writer.
raw_step.state_change: Determined that the intended workbook library and office renderer were unavailable, so a manual OOXML workbook generator was required.

task: Advanced high-value task: Quasi-Identifier Release Cell Causal Hypothesis Shortlist. Scenario: a governance team wants a reproducible analysis that another reviewer can rerun from the row data alone for quasi-identifier release cell. Embedded packet: Records: R1 cell_count=44 epsilon_requested=71 sensitive_field_count=5; R2 cell_count=53 epsilon_requested=67 sensitive_field_count=8; R3 cell_count=39 epsilon_requested=82 sensitive_field_count=4. Remediation options: O1 changes cell_count by -12% cost=78500; O2 changes epsilon_requested by -18% cost=96100; O3 changes sensitive_field_count by -25% cost=55900; max_budget=121200. Rules and constraints: cell_count<5 suppress; epsilon>1 requires privacy review; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: quantify the operational consequence of each exception and rank follow-up actions by urgency and evidentiary strength. Deliver privacy_release_2.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
